Community Events

View Upcoming Events In Support Of Mental Health

We partner with local organizations across Indiana to raise awareness around mental health and help kick the stigma in our communities. You can also find Kicking The Stigma at most Colts events, as we inspire fans to get involved and make a difference both on and off the field.

1 event found.
